_comment: Tier-2 Layer-E: cross-backend MCP-tool surface coverage. Instantiates FastMCP in-process, registers the consolidated tools (the same registration the live server uses), and calls knowledge / discover / prepare_simulation across 18 (backend, physics) probes covering all 6 available backends. Asserts: discover('list') mentions every available backend; discover('physics', solver=X) returns >=100 char text containing every probe physics + no 'Unknown' / 'Traceback' tokens; prepare_simulation returns >=200 char text containing the physics name (underscored, space-separated, OR a non-trivial token); knowledge(topic='physics', solver=X, physics=Y) returns >=100 char text mentioning the physics. Filed as kratos / auxiliary_overview / pitfall_index=100 in fixture.json for runner-routing purposes (the test is backend-agnostic; routing through the repo .venv via the kratos slot lets it import the full MCP stack).
